https://www.webstaurantstore.com/frielin.title: Frieling USA 26 oz. Polished Stainless Steel Double Wall Commercial French Press 0183 - 2/Case
https://www.webstaurantstore.com/frielin.description:
Create deliciously smooth coffee for your guests with this Frieling USA 26 oz. polished stainless steel double wall commercial French press! Ideal for hotels, restaurants, cafes, and bistros, this French press helps deliver a memorable beverage experience for your guests. Constructed from 100% stainless steel, it's built for long-lasting use and designed to withstand the demands of daily service. The elegant polished finish adds a touch of sophistication, enhancing the ambiance of any operation.

This French press features a double-walled insulated body that retains heat 4 times longer than glass, keeping your coffee hot during service. The two-screen filter keeps sediment and grounds out of your brew, producing a smooth, rich cup that delights the senses. Plus, the no-drip spout allows for easy pouring, preventing drips and messes, while the lid with convenient top knob further adds functional ease. Elevate your beverage service with steaming, aromatic coffee with this Frieling USA French press.

Overall Dimensions:
Length: 6"
Width: 4"
Height: 8"
Capacity: 26 oz.
